summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard recording that captures a rare early Dark Star, soaring High Time and a blazing China Cat > I Know You Rider from an enigmatic one‑set show.
review: The Miller soundboard cut is described as “out of this world,” delivering exceptional clarity and balance. Listeners rave about the performance – especially the early Dark Star, the fragment of High Time, and the fiery China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider sequence – noting the unusual two‑drummer/two‑keyboard lineup. One reviewer gave a zero‑star rating, making the overall sentiment mixed despite strong praise from the other two.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is highlighted as excellent with several standout songs, and recording quality is praised as superb; a single low‑star outlier keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as crystal‑clear, crisp, and “out of this world” with no noted dropouts or balance issues.

standout_songs: China Cat > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: One‑set show featuring an opening band, then the Dead delivering a tight set that builds from Cold Rain into a soaring Dark Star and peaks with High Time and a blazing China Cat > Rider sequence.
